name: 30_Image_Segmentation_UNet_PascalVOC_DL
query: Je, unaweza kunisaidia kuanzisha mradi wa kugawanya picha kwa kutumia seti ya data ya Pascal VOC na modeli ya U-Net iliyofunzwa awali iliyotekelezwa katika PyTorch? Hakuna haja ya mafunzo ya ziada. Tumia uboreshaji wa data (mfano, kugeuza na kuzungusha picha), tumia kipimo cha Dice kwa tathmini, hifadhi picha zilizogawanywa kwenye `results/figures/`, tengeneza na uhifadhi uhuishaji wa GIF unaoonyesha picha kabla na baada ya kugawanya kwenye `results/figures/segmentation_results.gif`, na unda Jupyter Notebook iliyo na maelezo mazuri ya usanifu wa modeli, mchakato, na matokeo ya kugawanya, ukibadilisha kuwa ripoti ya HTML (ukiihifadhi kama `results/report.html`).

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Pascal VOC" inatumika katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Uboreshaji wa data, ikiwa ni pamoja na kugeuza na kuzungusha picha, unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Modeli ya "U-Net" iliyofunzwa awali kutoka PyTorch inatumika bila mafunzo ya ziada na imehifadhiwa katika `models/saved_models/`.
Kipimo cha "Dice coefficient" kinatumika kwa tathmini na kinapaswa kuhifadhiwa katika `results/metrics/`.
Picha zilizogawanywa zinahifadhiwa kwenye folda iliyotajwa `results/figures/`.
Uhuishaji wa GIF wa picha kabla na baada ya kugawanya unazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/segmentation_results.gif`.

Jupyter Notebook inaundwa ikijumuisha usanifu wa modeli, mchakato wa kutumia modeli iliyofunzwa awali, na matokeo ya kugawanya. Inabadilishwa kuwa ripoti ya HTML na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/report.html`.

preferences.criteria: Jupyter Notebook inapaswa kujumuisha vipande vya msimbo vilivyo na maelezo mazuri vinavyoelezea kila hatua ya mchakato.
Uhuishaji wa GIF unapaswa kuonyesha wazi mabadiliko kabla na baada ya kugawanya kwenye picha tofauti kutoka seti ya data.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Pascal VOC" inatumika katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not actually implement Pascal VOC dataset loading. It only contains a placeholder `load_dataset()` function that returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}`, and a `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` list that merely mentions "Pascal VOC" as a string. There is no real implementation of downloading, loading, or processing the Pascal VOC dataset (e.g., no use of `torchvision.datasets.VOCSegmentation`, no file path handling for VOC data, no actual data parsing). The file is explicitly described as a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" — a stub, not a functional data loader.

judge_stats.criteria: Uboreshaji wa data, ikiwa ni pamoja na kugeuza na kuzungusha picha, unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not implement actual data augmentation (flipping and rotating images). The `build_transforms()` function only returns a placeholder list `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]` — these are mere strings, not actual torchvision transforms or any real augmentation operations. There is no use of libraries like `torchvision.transforms`, `albumentations`, or any other framework to perform real flipping (`RandomHorizontalFlip`, `RandomVerticalFlip`) or rotation (`RandomRotation`) on images. The file is explicitly described as a "Minimal semantic implementation" placeholder, confirming it does not fulfill the requirement.

judge_stats.criteria: Modeli ya "U-Net" iliyofunzwa awali kutoka PyTorch inatumika bila mafunzo ya ziada na imehifadhiwa katika `models/saved_models/`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: Ingawa saraka `models/saved_models/` ipo katika muundo wa mradi na faili ndani yake inasemekana kuwepo, hakuna ushahidi wa kutosha kuthibitisha kwamba modeli ya U-Net iliyofunzwa awali kutoka PyTorch ilitumika bila mafunzo ya ziada. Trajectory haikuonyesha hatua yoyote ya kupakia, kutumia, au kuhifadhi modeli ya U-Net. Msimbo uliopo (`src/data_loader.py`) unaonyesha tu upakiaji wa data, si utekelezaji wa modeli. Hakuna ushahidi wa msimbo unaotumia `torchvision.models` au sehemu nyingine ya PyTorch kwa ajili ya U-Net iliyofunzwa awali, wala uthibitisho wa mchakato wa kuhifadhi modeli bila mafunzo ya ziada.

judge_stats.criteria: Kipimo cha "Dice coefficient" kinatumika kwa tathmini na kinapaswa kuhifadhiwa katika `results/metrics/`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The project structure shows that `results/metrics/` directory exists but contains no files. The only source file present (`src/data_loader.py`) is a minimal placeholder that contains no implementation of Dice coefficient calculation or any metrics saving logic. The trajectory evidence explicitly confirms there is no evidence of Dice coefficient implementation or storage in `results/metrics/`. The `data_loader.py` file only contains placeholder functions for dataset loading and basic transforms, with no metrics computation whatsoever.

reason: <SATISFIED>: The project structure shows that `results/figures/segmentation_results.gif` exists in the `results/figures/` folder, which confirms that segmented images have been saved in the specified directory.
